title: 用 budget_tokens 开启 Extended Thinking

body.goal: 在 API 请求中开启 extended thinking，让 Claude 进行深度推理
steps: 在请求体中添加 thinking 参数：{"thinking": {"type": "enabled", "budget_tokens": 10000}}
budget_tokens 设置 Claude 可用于思考的最大 token 数（不含最终回答），最小值为 1024
确保 max_tokens 大于 budget_tokens —— max_tokens 是总预算（思考 + 回答），budget_tokens 是思考部分的上限
解析响应：content 数组中会包含 type 为 'thinking' 的 block（思考过程）和 type 为 'text' 的 block（最终回答）
注意：对 Claude 4.6 系列模型，推荐改用 adaptive thinking（{"thinking": {"type": "adaptive"}}），手动模式已被标记为 deprecated

body_en.goal: Enable extended thinking in API requests so Claude performs deep reasoning
steps: Add the thinking parameter to your request body: {"thinking": {"type": "enabled", "budget_tokens": 10000}}
budget_tokens sets the maximum tokens Claude can use for thinking (excluding the final answer); minimum is 1024
Ensure max_tokens > budget_tokens — max_tokens covers both thinking and response, while budget_tokens caps only the thinking portion
Parse the response: the content array will contain blocks with type 'thinking' (reasoning) and type 'text' (final answer)
Note: For Claude 4.6 models, use adaptive thinking ({"thinking": {"type": "adaptive"}}) instead — manual mode is deprecated
